compiled_state.title: RED: Test ticket-transition.sh consolidated close path
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add tests to tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh verifying consolidated close behavior:
- test_close_with_open_children_blocked_via_batch: create parent with 2 open children, attempt close → exit 1 with error listing open children (same observable behavior as before)
- test_close_unblock_works_via_batch: create A blocks B dependency, close A → output contains UNBLOCKED: B
- test_close_no_2n_spawns: close with children present, verify ticket_find_open_children is NOT called (grep ticket_find_open_children out of the transition script itself, not via runtime spy)

**Note**: Tests verify observable behavior (exit codes, stdout, stderr). No internal function spying.

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh (add test functions)
- .test-index (add RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
Tests fail because ticket-transition.sh still uses the old separate-call path.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (excluding RED-marked tests)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test test_close_with_open_children_blocked_via_batch exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_close_with_open_children_blocked_via_batch' tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh
- [ ] Test test_close_unblock_works_via_batch exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_close_unblock_works_via_batch' tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-transition.sh.*test-ticket-transition.sh.*test_close_with_open_children' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Lint passes, all 3 AC checks pass, RED confirmed for test_close_no_2n_spawns ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: 3 tests for consolidated transition close
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
